routine.name: Life OS Weekly Review
routine.schedule: Saturday 1:00 PM ET; first Saturday emits Monthly Deep

items.title: Call IRS re: LT26 notice — case ref 2593985414
File missing IRS tax return(s) — LT26 notice
Belle to send 30-day written notice on Walnut Creek lease (landlord confirmed; rest pro rata)
Buy Alexa speakers for Mom's music
Research Inspire device for Mom's sleep apnea
Confirm caregiver coverage for mom
Protect sleep — stabilize routine
Verify automations and reminders are actually live
Track weed use honestly (daily log)
Finish 2024 taxes
Follow up on mom's second-opinion / shunt-adjustment discussion
Life-admin sweep — gather all open action items
Update structured summary of mom's condition
Consolidate mom's active care issues into one master list
Decide: share financial/work stress with Belle now or hold
Resolve mom's CPAP mask/headgear fit
Nicole — prepare ADA accommodation request before return to work
Prepare explanation for dad and sister re: mom's misinterpretation of dad's help
Confirm bowel-regimen plan for mom (constipation recurrence)
Nicole — doctor completes Certification of Health Care Provider
Game plan for mom's current + future treatments + next primary visit
Help Nicole find medical device sales jobs
Evaluate night caregiver option for mom
Set up Voice Memos quick-capture + daily Shortcut
Inventory + measure: walk Mom's apartment, list furniture to remove, measure doorways and new-bed footprints
Grocery run: cottage cheese, broccoli, spicy cheese, coffee beans, jalapeños, garlic, cilantro
Hire Saturday mover (the guy who 'jumped' past job)
Design Scan vs Commit workflow split (two-phase commit pattern for 'update' command)
Identify top 3 personal tasks creating background stress — assign next action
Create detailed daily/weekly task list for Kiara (mom's caregiver)
Coordinate same-day swap window (AM removal → PM delivery) + confirm caregiver + elevator
Buy Belle a microwave
Research long-term care facilities — find, call, price
Design work-from-home AI job for Nicole (websites + small business pitching)
Financial planning: FL Medicaid asset transfer analysis
Buy a hammock
Deploy Tripwire cron — Notion integration + GitHub repo + NOTION_TOKEN secret
Prep Mom's recovery setup at home for post-op
Clean house + move boxes before sister & Danny arrive
Reply to Belle
🚨 Book furniture haulers TODAY — old sofa Sat morning, old bed + filing cabinet Sun morning
Get Nicole's written authorization confirming Suraj as her representative
Buy smell diffuser for Mom's room
Send STD doctor certification + file appeal letter to Sedgwick
Set up Calm app audio system in Mom's room
Call Sangita 1:1 (off the family thread) — just check on how she's doing
Call Dad — give him one concrete task to own + tell him he's seen
Texas nonsubscriber-injury attorney consult — outreach today, consult by Monday morning
Follow up with Lisa on EHSP response — deadline Monday 5pm
Nicole — pull pay stubs from 12/26/2025-3/25/2026 to verify wage rate before Lisa's worksheet arrives
(untitled)
(untitled)
(untitled)

SYNTHESIS [UNREVIEWED - AI-authored, Claude Fable 5] - Belle arc May 4 to Jun 7: stable concerns vs depletion-driven verdicts; two-pole blame pattern with the no-villain middle held only when resourced; move question = caretaking question; trust floor needs direction disambiguation

Real-time arc in one high-load conversation (Jun 7): self-blame ('what's wrong with me') → list of grievances about Belle; both halves held open (grievances may be accurate AND the speed of the flip on a depleted night is notable)

Articulated case against the relationship / Belle relocating (Jun 7) — under-prioritized ('not obsessed the way she should be'), recent near-breakup during his depression, anticipated dependence, absent trust vs. his 'no relationship without trust again' line
Reframe: a trauma response is an alarm firing, not a verdict - and the self-blame conversion is what does the damage
Belle Insights summary — cross-pattern synthesis (June 2026 session)
Why the relationship feels uncomfortable: Belle's negative reactions land as being put in her abusers' category, and it turns into self-blame
Manage the function, support the feelings — don't try to make the family grieve your way
Family is a step or two behind on the same road — seeing first means grieving first
Mom's progression: the window of awareness is finite — plan by last year's rate of change

Reproductive legal helpline call notes (May 20) - Texas legal landscape: OB-GYN records not a risk, exposure falls on providers (criminal) and helpers (civil ~$10k) not the pregnant person, Belle has right to travel for care; ~12wk2d gestational using Feb 23 LMP; nearest out-of-state options NM (24wk) and Kansas (21wk); no decision made

Belle letter SENT Monday May 18 11pm ET - comprehensive session synthesis, Belle's flat acknowledgment response, open decisions awaiting substantive response (San Antonio trip, response timing, work re-engagement, Mom care), reach-again-after-letter pattern caught in real time, structural diagnosis preserved separately for therapy

Final-final letter to Belle (May 18 late / May 19 send) - single-pattern rejection-on-reach reframe, two examples (scared voice misread, closeness called weird) as expressions of the one pattern, Disney + life-load + resentment in one beat, implicit fork only at close; structurally most accurate version after weekend-long drafting arc

Structural diagnosis of Belle relationship dynamic (May 18 evening) - Belle came from people who didn't honor feelings/limits and lacked template for receiving an attuned partner; Ender's boundaries crumbled because Belle's trauma responses to limits (sobbing, suicidal ideation, self-harm) made enforcement feel like endangering her safety; self-reinforcing dynamic that explains the rejection-on-reach pattern and the resulting depletion

Final condensed letter to Belle (May 18 evening, held overnight for May 19 morning send) - drowning analogy for scared-misread-as-yelling pattern, closeness-as-language for being-made-to-feel-wrong-for-needing pattern, giving-frame as load-bearing center, soft fork with unconditional family/baby commitment; hostile paragraph + disclaimer + bullet list + Disney + swimsuit moment held back

Disney response paragraph (drafted May 18, not used in letter) - both-halves framing connecting Disney comment and 'what a joke' as two instances of the same avoidance pattern; held back from letter as tangent but preserved for use if Belle raises Disney directly

Swimsuit picture moment on Ender's birthday - parallel anchor to the brushing video in the closeness pattern; previously-agreed scaled-down ask refused snappily on birthday night while at parents' caring for mom; cost severe enough that Ender couldn't sleep and it affected his entire week; the asymmetry with Belle's birthday a month earlier is direct and quantifiable

Two-stage insight (May 17-18) - reciprocity as condition for continuing, and the wrong-shape-relationship frame; this relationship became a measurement against expectations Ender is failing, the same shape he left his prior marriage to escape

Long draft text to Belle (May 16 evening, unsent) - maximalist version with scared-not-angry framing using 'wanting to live with me' call, the suppression dynamic, honest depression naming, and unconditional won't-abandon-pregnancy commitment; saved per Ender's request before drafting a fresh-perspective alternative

Belle conversation handoff UPDATE (May 13 → May 15) — read after the May 13 handoff page; covers Wed-through-Fri stretch including the not-sent long draft, the Friday McDonald's + apology move actually sent, Saturday FaceTime prep, and the still-unresolved medical track

Ender owns 'What a joke' was cruel and the Mother's Day omission — first explicit self-application of the symmetry-principle to his contributions in the current stretch; 'going forward I will' on Mother's Day is the first concrete behavioral commitment

Belle conversation continuity handoff (May 3–May 13) — read this first in the new thread; includes the drafted but not-yet-sent boundaries-with-exit text, the live state, calibration notes, and a directory of Insights to pull
Belle's 4/16/26 formal incident report email to Action Behavior Centers manager Analisa Mason — workplace safety + pregnancy + denied reassignment, verbatim preserved

May 5–May 13 chronology fill-in — Mother's Day collision, brushing-video rejection, Sunday-Monday escalation to Belle's 'find a hotel or stay with your ex' ultimatum; Ender has not responded ~16 hours; Sandra 1:1 + family visit consuming capacity
Principle — 10-second interrupt rule: when I notice 'this is going wrong' in real time, say something within 10 seconds. Imperfect interruption beats letting the wrong thing complete.
Hair (current cut): thinning shears over-texturized parts of wavy/curly hair — recoverable in 2-3 weeks; side asymmetry likely combo of cut + curl contraction
Principle — what to tell the hairstylist: no thinning shears, scissors-only soft shaping

Back pain: on/off for years, started after lifting too heavy; sitting/desk job aggravates; consistent yoga+PT+stretch+core routine helps but compliance drops for months at a time; need to narrow diagnosis → shorter targeted routine → higher compliance
The voice change is from insecurity-seeking-reassurance, not generalized stress — and the timing isn't random, it's specifically when Ender is reaching out in need / vulnerability

Self-hypothesis: Belle's 'yelling' perception may be hearing a real panic/anxiety vocal signature that's audibly different from regular voice but is mislabeled as anger — both halves preserved without either canceling the other

Prior couples therapy attempt — Ender arranged, Belle attended, therapist appeared to side with Ender (or Belle perceived sidedness), Belle reacted strongly and called therapist unprofessional; not a clean experience, complicates therapy as the easy answer

Recurring complaint-mirror pattern — Belle says 'I can't talk to you, you get angry,' which is what Ender has said to her; multiple readings held open (genuine symmetry vs defensive mirror vs Ender's objectivity-claim being its own defense vs combination)

May 5 evening Belle call (day after breakthrough) — Ender raised hurt over 'no space for my stuff' comment instead of bottling; Belle responded 'why are you yelling at me' and exited sick; Ender says he wasn't yelling, was hurt/sad/scared

May 4 late-evening callback — possible breakthrough; Ender articulated 'recognition, not guilt or revenge' principle; Belle committed to try; Ender flags open question of whether stated commitment translates to behavior

May 4 evening call with Belle — Ender accepted responsibility for bottling-and-explosion pattern; Belle says she loves him but is unsure about relationship; Saturday is load-bearing (trigger detail: declined sex with next-day deferral → Uber-to-airport response → yelling); Belle ended call crying unable to continue
July 2025 Nicole drama — acts designed to hurt + jealousy origin (cause does not exempt act; same principle applied to Nicole as to self)
2025 location trade-off named — Belle over Mom; naming it is the work, repeating it isn't
The losses were a risk-judgment failure, not a risk-taking failure — the high brain is the actual fix
When Mom says she feels like a burden — don't dismiss, don't overpromise
Caregiver math — saying yes to every request isn't possible; guilt isn't fixed by trying harder
Trust Belle's actions, not her words — they tell different stories
Hudson assault and Nicole's response — detailed factual record (ChatGPT memo, May 4 2026) filling the May 4 'Pre-Belle wound' gap
Pre-Belle wound — Hudson attack + Nicole turning on me, shortly before the May 2025 Belle seed event
May 2025 'would you be with me if I had nothing' — the initial seed for fear-of-abandonment / fear-of-rejection-from-a-misused-word pattern
Cumulative stress arc since April 2025 — financial, relationship, career, investing, Mom, demotion stacked over ~13 months
Belle's May 4 statement: 'felt like I didn't love her anymore' — her experience of cumulative pulling-away, with the birthday photo incident as inflection
Three distinct internal states behind apparent withdrawal — overwhelm, fear-of-talking, resentment-over-small-unmet-asks
Belle canceled May 7 OB appointment via text — unilateral relative to the call's deferral framing, but the appointment was hers
Live experience of 'Belle goes colder when I cry for help' — with anger about the SA sacrifice underneath
May 4 call ended in deferral — Belle frames termination around "don't want a kid with someone who'd yell at me"; reading my pulling-away since birthday photo incident
Origin of the absorption pattern — trying to hold her pain because reasoning couldn't reach her PTSD/anxiety
